rows.label: qev015202_MSG0001
rows.name: Are you the one Ajoa hired? Good work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0002
rows.name:
It looks like the enemies on the route are mostly
cleared out. The contractors who were hesitating about
the danger should finally get off their heavy rears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Now the construction work can
begin in earnest. But, we still
have about two problems left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0004
rows.name: One is a safety issue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0005
rows.name:
The route to NLA is safe, but there are still
troublesome enemies around here, and we can't
work in peace until we get rid of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0006
rows.name: The other is a materials issue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0007
rows.name:
Because we were attacked by enemies recently,
we've run short on building materials.
Procuring those is an urgent task as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0008
rows.name:
It would be a huge help if you
could assist us with one of these.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_JNK0010
rows.name: Subjugate Enemies

rows.label: qev015202_SEL0011
rows.name:
Defeat the enemies around
the construction site.

rows.label: qev015202_JNK0020
rows.name: Gather Materials

rows.label: qev015202_SEL0021
rows.name: Procure building materials.

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0009
rows.name:
As expected of a BLADE,
a pro in that field.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll leave it to you, then. I'll
gather the materials in the meantime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0011
rows.name:
I see. As a BLADE familiar
with the land of Mira, you can
gather anything in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll leave it to you, then. I'll
think of a way to exterminate the
external enemies in the meantime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm good at physical labor, but
fighting enemies is a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0014
rows.name:
Once things settle down, want
to work at the site with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0015
rows.name: Oh, you're safe. Impressive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0016
rows.name:
Now we can focus on our work
without worry. I thank you on
behalf of the workers. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0017
rows.name: Oh, right. Could you give this to Ajoa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0018
rows.name:
It's water from here. We've tested the
water quality over and over, but... It
seems she's still worried about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0019
rows.name:
I guarantee it would make some
delicious alcohol if we used
this water to brew it, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well, we'll just have to toast
with water for a while longer.
See ya, I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0021
rows.name:
Please deliver that water to Ajoa. If
she sees it, she's sure to understand
that the water gathered here is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0022
rows.name:
The building materials we need are
5 Dawn Knights and 5 Happy Waters.
Hurry up and get them for us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0023
rows.name: Oh! Good work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0024
rows.name:
That's quite a haul. With this,
we can bring the work schedule
forward significantly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0025
rows.name:
I appreciate it. When the facility
is finished, I might even put
your name on the monument.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, I don't plan on building a
monument, though! Gahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0027
rows.name: Oh, right. Could you give this to Ajoa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's water from here. We've tested the
water quality over and over, but... It
seems she's still worried about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0029
rows.name:
I guarantee it would make some
delicious alcohol if we used
this water to brew it, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, we'll just have to toast
with water for a while longer.
See ya, I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015202_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please deliver that water to Ajoa. If
she sees it, she's sure to understand
that the water gathered here is safe.[ST:wait ]
